mapper.sql: r.id, r.dormitory_id, r.room_number, r.capacity, r.current_occupancy, r.daily_rate, r.room_type, r.ac_type, r.memo1, r.memo2, r.memo3, r.status, r.version, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, d.dorm_name AS dormName
FROM tbl_room r LEFT JOIN tbl_dormitory d ON r.dormitory_id = d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_room ( dormitory_id, room_number, capacity, current_occupancy, daily_rate, room_type, ac_type, memo1, memo2, memo3, status, version, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{dormitoryId}, #{roomNumber}, #{capacity}, COALESCE(#{currentOccupancy}, 0), #{dailyRate}, #{roomType}, #{acType}, #{memo1}, #{memo2}, #{memo3}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), 0, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_room
room_number = #{roomNumber},
capacity = #{capacity},
current_occupancy = #{currentOccupancy},
daily_rate = #{dailyRate},
room_type = #{roomType},
ac_type = #{acType},
memo1 = #{memo1},
memo2 = #{memo2},
memo3 = #{memo3},
status = #{status},
version = version + 1,
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
